---
title: "Beam Physics with Intense Space Charge"
subtitle: "USPAS 2026"
---

* [Plasma Physics of Beams](lectures/01_plasma_physics.pdf)
* [Envelope Equations](lectures/02_envelope_equations.pdf)
* [Beam Current Limits](lectures/03_current_limits.pdf)
* [Beam Mismatch and Halo Formation](lectures/04_halo_formation.pdf)
* [Intrabeam Collisions, Gas and Electron Effects](lectures/05_collisions.pdf)
